title: Timers
scope: Short, in-memory countdown timers (sub-30-minute: cooking, pomodoros) that fire a notification when they expire. Ephemeral — each timer is an asyncio task with no database row; the only persisted artifact is the notification on expiry. NOT long-term reminders (the Reminders app) or recurring schedules (the Schedules app).

specs.title: Start a timer
specs.behavior: Starting a timer launches a background countdown of a given duration that fires a notification to the user when it expires.

specs.title: List timers
specs.behavior: Listing returns the user's active (still-running) timers.

specs.title: Cancel a timer
specs.behavior: Cancelling stops an active timer before it fires.
